docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,504.00 FILED BY YE, HONG AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, ROSETTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PENG, ROSETTA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YE, HONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENG, ROSETTA $2,504.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED IS SEPT. 10,1998 AT 1:30 PM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
